hello.title: Hello API
hello.description: The simplest Hono GET endpoint — learn how Next.js Route Handlers integrate with Hono.
hello.setupDesc: A single catch-all route handler delegates all /api/* requests to Hono.
hello.tryItDesc: Click the link below to test the API endpoint:
hello.honoIntegrationDesc: Hono integrates with Next.js Route Handlers via the hono/vercel adapter. A single catch-all route handles all HTTP methods.
hello.middlewareDesc: Hono's middleware chain (e.g. logger) provides request logging and other features for all routes, similar to Express.

posts.title: Posts CRUD API
posts.description: A complete RESTful CRUD API — built with Hono + Drizzle ORM + Zod validation.
posts.validationDesc: @hono/zod-validator automatically validates request bodies. Invalid data returns a 400 error.
posts.typesSafeDesc: Zod schemas provide both runtime validation and TypeScript type inference. Define once, stay safe everywhere.
posts.drizzleIntegrationDesc: Drizzle ORM provides type-safe SQL queries. Combined with better-sqlite3, zero config for local development.

og.title: OG Image Generation
og.description: Dynamically generate Open Graph images using ImageResponse from next/og — define image content with JSX.
og.previewDesc: The image below is generated in real-time by the /api/og endpoint:
og.queryParamsDesc: Customize image content via URL query parameters.
og.jsxToImageDesc: Use familiar JSX syntax to define image layouts. Supports flexbox layout and basic CSS properties.
og.dynamicContentDesc: Generate different images based on URL parameters, database data, or any server-side data.

stream.title: Streaming Response
stream.description: Build streaming responses with Hono's streamText — data sent line by line, displayed in real-time.
stream.liveDemoDesc: Click the button to watch streaming response lines arrive one by one.
stream.progressiveUIDesc: Streaming lets users see partial results immediately without waiting for the full response. Perfect for AI chat, logs, and long-running processes.
stream.honoStreamDesc: Hono provides the streamText helper to simplify creating streaming responses. Supports writeln, sleep, and more.
